purpose: Define the exact certificate object required to claim out-of-sample rejection of six-parameter flat Lambda-CDM.

certificate_target.quantified_condition: for every theta in the flat Lambda-CDM parameter space, the profiled likelihood over calibrated systematics is rejected by the independent multiprobe dataset battery
certificate_target.minimum_rejection_threshold: >= 5 sigma global after systematics and look-elsewhere correction
certificate_target.holdout_requirement: at least one alternative model must fit blind or out-of-sample holdout data with stable parameters across CMB + BAO + SN + lensing + growth

blocking_reason: The required executed multiprobe likelihood and holdout-stability evidence are not present in this repository.
boundary: Certificate target only. The repository does not currently contain the evidence required to certify Lambda-CDM rejection.
